description_long: This is a luxurious wristwatch with a gold-toned metal case and bracelet, featuring a striking emerald green dial. The watch face displays three subdials, gold hour markers, and hands, with a chronograph function indicated by the side pushers and crown. The bracelet is composed of solid, rectangular links with a polished finish, giving it a robust and elegant appearance. The clasp is integrated seamlessly into the bracelet, maintaining the watch's streamlined look. The overall design is geometric and modern, with a focus on clean lines and symmetry. The watch exudes sophistication and is likely intended as a statement accessory for urban wear.
description: A gold-toned wristwatch with a green dial, three subdials, and a polished metal bracelet. The design is geometric and modern, exuding luxury and sophistication.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green dial, gold hour markers, hands, and three subdials, with the bracelet extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers, as well as the articulated bracelet links.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clasp and the back of the bracelet, with the case and pushers partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and the smooth, continuous bracelet links.
